companyLocation.name: Company Office
companyLocation.note: Change latitude and longitude to your office location. Radius is in meters.

messages.locationPermissionMessage: This app needs access to your location to verify your attendance. Please allow location access to continue.
messages.locationDeniedMessage: You have denied location access. Please enable location permission in your browser settings to use attendance features.
messages.locationUnavailableMessage: Unable to retrieve your location. Please check if GPS is enabled on your device.
messages.locationTimeoutMessage: Location request timed out. Please try again.
messages.outsideRadiusMessage: You are outside the allowed office area. Please move closer to the office to check in.
messages.lowAccuracyMessage: GPS accuracy is too low. Please enable high accuracy mode in your device settings.

workingHours.note: All times in HH:MM (24-hour format). halfDayThreshold is in hours. Enable/disable check-in and check-out buttons.
